name: Leaderboard Playground
tagline: A single-player game with an on-chain leaderboard you can mod.
description: Starter template demonstrating clean separation between a game, an on-chain scoreboard, and a smart contract. Ships with Flappy Bird, a PVM leaderboard contract on Paseo Asset Hub, and a swappable scoreboard interface. Plug in any game that emits a numeric score, or swap the backend (contract → Bulletin, contract → real signer) without touching the game.
